## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] I ran `uv run pytest`
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed

## Risk and Rollout

- [ ] This change is backward compatible
- [ ] This change has user-facing impact documented in README or docs
- [ ] This change requires follow-up work (describe below if checked)

## Additional Notes

Include edge cases, limitations, or follow-up tasks as needed.
